questionHtml: Comment on the spontaneity of the reaction at 298 K.

meta.title: Comment on the spontaneity of the reaction at 298 K.
breadcrumbLabels: Reactivity 1.4.3—At constant pressure, a change is spontaneous if the change in Gibbs energy, ΔG, is negative. Interpret the sign of ΔG calculated from thermodynamic data. Determine the temperature at which a reaction becomes spontaneous.
